title: Constant Difference Rubric
description: Evaluates reasoning about repeated additive change in sequences and tables.

dimensions.title: Observation accuracy
dimensions.description: Identifies relevant table or sequence values.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Look for accurate references to given values.

dimensions.title: Relationship type
dimensions.description: Distinguishes constant difference from other patterns.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Check whether the learner names repeated addition.

dimensions.title: Evidence use
dimensions.description: Uses multiple data points to support the pattern.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Look for at least one row-to-row comparison.

dimensions.title: Rule formation
dimensions.description: Forms a repeatable rule for extension.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Check if the explanation can generate new values.

dimensions.title: Formal representation
dimensions.description: Connects the pattern to symbols when needed.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Do not require equations for foundation tasks unless prompted.

dimensions.title: Uncertainty awareness
dimensions.description: Signals confidence and checks uncertainty appropriately.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Look for careful checking when confidence is low.

dimensions.title: Transfer
dimensions.description: Applies the same repeated-change idea in a new context.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Use only transfer responses for this dimension.
positiveEvidence: Uses same rate idea in new values

dimensions.title: Support dependence
dimensions.description: Captures how much support was needed.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Record support level without labeling ability.

title: Additive vs Multiplicative Rubric
description: Evaluates whether the learner selects and tests the correct relationship type.

dimensions.title: Observation accuracy
dimensions.description: Reads row values and candidate rules accurately.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Check table values and predicted values.

dimensions.title: Relationship type
dimensions.description: Distinguishes additive change, multiplicative ratio, and offset.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Look for explicit comparison of differences or ratios.
negativeEvidence: Uses difference when ratio is constant

dimensions.title: Evidence use
dimensions.description: Tests candidate rules across rows.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: A strong response tests more than one row.

dimensions.title: Rule formation
dimensions.description: Forms a rule that matches the relationship type.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Check whether the rule reproduces data.

dimensions.title: Formal representation
dimensions.description: Represents the relationship verbally or symbolically.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Symbols should match context when used.

dimensions.title: Uncertainty awareness
dimensions.description: Treats a first rule as a hypothesis to verify.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Reward rule testing over unsupported confidence.

dimensions.title: Transfer
dimensions.description: Chooses the same relationship type in a new context.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Evaluate relation type, not just answer.

dimensions.title: Support dependence
dimensions.description: Records support needed to test and repair the rule.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Describe support, not learner ability.

title: Table to Linear Equation Rubric
description: Evaluates conversion from table evidence to verbal and symbolic linear rules.

dimensions.title: Observation accuracy
dimensions.description: Reads inputs, outputs, and row structure accurately.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Check whether x and y values are read correctly.

dimensions.title: Relationship type
dimensions.description: Identifies the relation as linear when appropriate.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Look for rate plus possible intercept.

dimensions.title: Evidence use
dimensions.description: Uses table evidence to justify equation parts.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Each symbol should trace back to evidence.

dimensions.title: Rule formation
dimensions.description: Forms a complete linear rule.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Check rate, intercept, and target substitution.

dimensions.title: Formal representation
dimensions.description: Uses variables and symbols meaningfully.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Equation must match variable roles.

dimensions.title: Uncertainty awareness
dimensions.description: Checks whether symbolic work matches the table.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Look for self-checks against known rows.

dimensions.title: Transfer
dimensions.description: Builds an equation in a new context.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Use transfer task evidence only.

dimensions.title: Support dependence
dimensions.description: Records support needed to connect table and equation.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Record support level neutrally.

title: Transfer Reasoning Rubric
description: Evaluates whether a learner applies a learned idea independently in a new context.

dimensions.title: Observation accuracy
dimensions.description: Reads the transfer context and values accurately.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Check that transfer values, not original values, are used.

dimensions.title: Relationship type
dimensions.description: Identifies the same core concept in changed values.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Look for relationship type, not surface wording.
positiveEvidence: Finds same concept with new numbers

dimensions.title: Evidence use
dimensions.description: Uses transfer evidence independently.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Strong evidence cites new row comparisons.

dimensions.title: Rule formation
dimensions.description: Forms a new rule for the transfer problem.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: The rule should use new values.
negativeEvidence: Uses old rate when values differ

dimensions.title: Formal representation
dimensions.description: Uses formal notation when helpful.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Do not require notation unless transfer asks for it.

dimensions.title: Uncertainty awareness
dimensions.description: Checks the transfer answer before submitting.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Look for independent verification.

dimensions.title: Transfer
dimensions.description: Captures independent transfer performance.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: This is the primary dimension for transfer tasks.

dimensions.title: Support dependence
dimensions.description: Records how much support was needed during transfer.
dimensions.evaluationGuidance: Record level of help without score language.
